papers.title: Serologic evidence of hantavirus exposure in forest workers
papers.abstract: A cross-sectional study tested 371 forest workers for hantavirus antibodies. Hantavirus IgG was detected in 7.3% of participants. Exposure was associated with frequent rodent contact. The study was limited by its single-region design and lack of longitudinal follow-up.

source_records.title: Serologic evidence of hantavirus exposure in forest workers
source_records.abstract: A cross-sectional study tested 371 forest workers for hantavirus antibodies. Hantavirus IgG was detected in 7.3% of participants. Exposure was associated with frequent rodent contact. The study was limited by its single-region design and lack of longitudinal follow-up.

analysis.background: A cross-sectional study tested 371 forest workers for hantavirus antibodies.
analysis.methods: Hantavirus IgG was detected in 7.3% of participants.
analysis.results: Exposure was associated with frequent rodent contact. The study was limited by its single-region design and lack of longitudinal follow-up.

papers.title_zh: 林业工作者汉坦病毒暴露的血清学证据

analysis_zh.background: 林业工作者经常接触啮齿动物,可能存在未识别的汉坦病毒暴露风险。
analysis_zh.methods: 采用横断面设计,对371名林业工作者检测汉坦病毒抗体并评估啮齿动物接触史。
analysis_zh.results: 7.3%的参与者检出汉坦病毒IgG;频繁接触啮齿动物与血清阳性相关。
analysis_zh.contribution: 结果提示职业人群应加强啮齿动物暴露监测和针对性防护。
analysis_zh.limitations: 研究仅覆盖单一区域,且缺少纵向随访,不能直接推断感染时间和因果关系。

papers.summary_zh: 背景：林业工作者经常接触啮齿动物,可能存在未识别的汉坦病毒暴露风险。 方法：采用横断面设计,对371名林业工作者检测汉坦病毒抗体并评估啮齿动物接触史。 结果：7.3%的参与者检出汉坦病毒IgG;频繁接触啮齿动物与血清阳性相关。 贡献：结果提示职业人群应加强啮齿动物暴露监测和针对性防护。 局限：研究仅覆盖单一区域,且缺少纵向随访,不能直接推断感染时间和因果关系。

papers.title: Hantavirus infections in a changing world: a narrative review
papers.abstract: This review discusses hantavirus epidemiology, reservoir ecology, pathogenesis, diagnosis, and prevention. Evidence indicates that environmental change and human contact with rodent reservoirs alter spillover risk. Gaps include limited prospective surveillance and few licensed countermeasures. Future work should integrate One Health surveillance and standardized clinical studies.

source_records.title: Hantavirus infections in a changing world: a narrative review
source_records.abstract: This review discusses hantavirus epidemiology, reservoir ecology, pathogenesis, diagnosis, and prevention. Evidence indicates that environmental change and human contact with rodent reservoirs alter spillover risk. Gaps include limited prospective surveillance and few licensed countermeasures. Future work should integrate One Health surveillance and standardized clinical studies.

analysis.background: This review discusses hantavirus epidemiology, reservoir ecology, pathogenesis, diagnosis, and prevention.
analysis.main_directions: Evidence indicates that environmental change and human contact with rodent reservoirs alter spillover risk. Gaps include limited prospective surveillance and few licensed countermeasures.
analysis.current_state: Future work should integrate One Health surveillance and standardized clinical studies.

analysis.future_research: 需根据全文进一步判断。

papers.title_zh: 变化世界中的汉坦病毒感染：叙述性综述

analysis_zh.background: 环境变化与人兽接触增加正在改变汉坦病毒的传播和溢出风险。
analysis_zh.main_directions: 综述流行病学、储存宿主生态、致病机制、诊断和预防等主要方向。
analysis_zh.current_state: 现有证据支持环境与宿主生态变化会影响人群暴露,但不同地区的监测能力不均。
analysis_zh.gaps: 前瞻性监测、标准化临床研究和获批干预措施仍然不足。
analysis_zh.future_research: 应推进一体化健康监测、长期宿主生态研究和可比的临床队列研究。

papers.summary_zh: 背景：环境变化与人兽接触增加正在改变汉坦病毒的传播和溢出风险。 主要方向：综述流行病学、储存宿主生态、致病机制、诊断和预防等主要方向。 研究现状：现有证据支持环境与宿主生态变化会影响人群暴露,但不同地区的监测能力不均。 不足：前瞻性监测、标准化临床研究和获批干预措施仍然不足。 后续研究：应推进一体化健康监测、长期宿主生态研究和可比的临床队列研究。

news.title: Health authority reports a suspected hantavirus case
news.excerpt: On Tuesday, the regional health authority reported one suspected hantavirus case in County A. The patient is stable and confirmatory testing is under way. Officials advised residents to avoid contact with rodent droppings. No additional cases have been reported.
news.content: On Tuesday, the regional health authority reported one suspected hantavirus case in County A. The patient is stable and confirmatory testing is under way. Officials advised residents to avoid contact with rodent droppings. No additional cases have been reported.

news.title_zh: 卫生部门报告一例疑似汉坦病毒病例

analysis_zh.event: 地区卫生部门报告1例疑似汉坦病毒病例,正在进行确证检测。
analysis_zh.impact: 患者病情稳定;部门同时提醒居民避免接触啮齿动物排泄物。
analysis_zh.status: 截至报道时未发现新增病例,事件仍处于调查和实验室确认阶段。

news.summary_zh: 时间：本周二报告。 地点：A县。 事件：地区卫生部门报告1例疑似汉坦病毒病例,正在进行确证检测。 影响：患者病情稳定;部门同时提醒居民避免接触啮齿动物排泄物。 状态：截至报道时未发现新增病例,事件仍处于调查和实验室确认阶段。
